title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE PRIMO GAFFUD DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN ECHAGUE, ISABELA, FROM TWENTY-FIVE (25) TO FIFTY (50) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 8362 / 88 OG No. 10, 1292 (Mar. 9, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7184, January 30, 1992 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE PRIMO GAFFUD DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN ECHAGUE, ISABELA, FROM TWENTY-FIVE (25) TO FIFTY (50) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The bed capacity of the Primo Gaffud District Hospital in Echague, Isabela, is hereby increased from twenty-five (25) to fifty (50) beds.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

JOVITO R. SALONGA

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 16, 1991 and December 3, 1991, respectively.

EDWIN P. ACOBA

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: January 30, 1992

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
